qualityBar.principle: Fixture quality bar: every concept must name a world whose look immediately yields a palette and material vocabulary, a type voice, component roles, and one signature state change for deterministic seed testing.
rejectIf: Fixture gate one: the form names a generic software container instead of a visual world.
Fixture gate two: the form is a single prop with no system behind it.
Fixture gate three: the form is abstract mood with no graspable grammar.
Fixture gate four: the form duplicates an existing entry at system level.
Fixture gate five: the form cannot span navigation, dense, and quiet surfaces.
reviewAxes: Fixture axis four: use of the medium.
Fixture axis six: breadth across surfaces.

concepts.form: a poster wall of the fixture canon, where ranked plates, shutters, and registers stage attention across one continuous working field
concepts.lineage: Fixture lineage of poster wall craft, publishing, and display convention
system: Palette/material: ink-dark ground, unbleached paper field, and one saturated signal color reserved for the active decision in zone 1
Type/composition: compact grotesk labels over generous editorial serif, ranked on a strict modular grid of order 1
Topology/navigation: move between the whole field and one consequential detail along route 1
Controls/state: reveal, compare, and preserve every meaningful authored state in register 1
Responsive/motion: recompose the spatial law while retaining orientation across breakpoint 1
concepts.spark: The poster wall wakes as its plates roll over one by one, every register finding its rank while a single saturated signal tracks the decision you have not made yet.
concepts.webLeverage: CSS grid plate choreography with a keyboard-readable register index and scroll-driven rank reveal

concepts.form: a ash pavilion of the fixture canon, where ranked plates, shutters, and registers stage attention across one continuous working field
concepts.lineage: Fixture lineage of ash pavilion craft, publishing, and display convention
system: Palette/material: ink-dark ground, unbleached paper field, and one saturated signal color reserved for the active decision in zone 33
Type/composition: compact grotesk labels over generous editorial serif, ranked on a strict modular grid of order 33
Topology/navigation: move between the whole field and one consequential detail along route 33
Controls/state: reveal, compare, and preserve every meaningful authored state in register 33
Responsive/motion: recompose the spatial law while retaining orientation across breakpoint 33
